Team Meeting Notes - October 15, 2025

Attendees: Alice (PM), Bob (Engineering Lead), Carol (Design)

Agenda:
1. Widget Pro launch timeline
2. Customer feedback review
3. Q4 roadmap priorities

Discussion:
Alice confirmed Widget Pro launch is on track for November 1st.
Bob raised a concern about battery firmware needing one more QA cycle.
Carol presented the updated packaging design, approved by marketing.

Action Items:
- Bob: Complete firmware testing by October 22nd
- Alice: Send launch announcement draft to marketing by October 18th
- Carol: Finalize retail display mockups by October 20th

Next meeting: October 22, 2025
